title: Allow mirrored column to be use in Kanban column
excerpt: It would be great if we can choose here the mirrored columns in the board.

posts.author: ncortez (Neri)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if we can choose here the mirrored columns in the board.

image432×575 19.2 KB

posts.author: arf (Alex R-F)
posts.cookedHtml:
BUMP...

With the release of Monday Workflows, users like me are building more complex systems with multiple connected boards and strategic use of mirror columns. The fact that these mirror columns can’t be displayed on kanban cards is a huge irritation. Please revisit!
